title: DO NOT MERGE: Include unmerged PRs
body:
<s>https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1003</s> (now merged but not in a release)
https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1352

to run tests.

comments.body: Now that the c/storage PR has been merged, the c/image PR can depend on a git commit without requiring a top-level `replace` directive, so this Skopeo PR is not necessary to show that the c/image PR passes tests.
